title: Pocketed
body:
# About

**Pocketed** is a Resource Pack that redesigns Minecraft's GUI elements to look more like [alpha Pocket Edition's](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pocket_Edition_v0.6.1_alpha) GUIs. 

> This Resource Pack is still in active development and most GUIs are still unfinished.

# Gallery

![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xNSZxDax/images/d1a8f5e6ad7c672da7b4d4b1c7e6daf3832e284a.png)

![Options Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xNSZxDax/images/cbac178ccd6b3c0cc1839adee76587dd134fb95c.png)
